title: Nostalgic Umami Gooey Tomato Stir-fry
description: A nostalgic Syrian dish featuring gooey tomatoes with a touch of black pepper for an umami flavor profile, suitable for nut-free diets.
instructions: Preheat your wok or skillet over medium-high heat.
Slice the onions and tomatoes into thin pieces.
In a hot pan, sauté the sliced onions until they turn translucent.
Add the garlic and stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not burnt.
Season with black pepper. Taste to adjust as needed, then add tomatoes.
Cook gently on low-medium heat for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally until the tomatoes are soft and slightly gooey, adding a splash of water if necessary to keep them from sticking.
